introSection: Tiger Express is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at La Mer de Sable in France. From 2000 until late 2010, the roller coaster was located in Walibi World in the Netherlands under the name Flying Dutchman Gold Mine.
fullText:
Tiger Express is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at La Mer de Sable in France. From 2000 until late 2010, the roller coaster was located in Walibi World in the Netherlands under the name Flying Dutchman Gold Mine.


 * 2011 in amusement parks

infoboxRaw.name: Tiger Express
infoboxRaw.caption: Tiger Express at La Mer de sable
infoboxRaw.previousnames: Flying Dutchman Gold Mine at Six Flags Holland/Walibi World (2000–2010)
